security.csp: default-src 'self' tauri: ipc:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval' tauri: ipc:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://static2.sharepointonline.com https://spoprod-a.akamaihd.net; img-src * data: file: blob: tauri: ipc:; font-src 'self' https://static2.sharepointonline.com https://spoprod-a.akamaihd.net file: tauri:; connect-src https: http: file: tauri: ipc: ws: wss:;

bundle.longDescription: Fluent Reader is a modern desktop RSS reader built with Tauri, React, and TypeScript.
